description: A genre painting depicting a group of men and one woman gathered around a piano in what appears to be a dimly lit bar or parlor. A man sits at the piano with his head resting on his hand. The others stand behind him, some singing, others looking on with various expressions. Wine glasses are arranged on the piano. The figures are rendered in Grant Wood's characteristic solid, somewhat caricatured style. The mood is warm and communal, capturing a moment of informal group singing.
